event: presented to the accident and emergency department
two episodes of acute diverticulitis past 2 years
hospitalized for ruptured diverticulum in sigmoid colon
tenderness on deep palpation left lower quadrant
rectal examination no stool in vault
abdominal CT scan showed stenosis of sigmoid colon
prior CT showed stenotic lesion in sigmoid colon
CT scan ruled out pulmonary embolism
intubated due to respiratory muscle fatigue
clinical and laboratory findings compatible with toxic megacolon
patient remains in good health 4 years later
